calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-20-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-03-2025 Set For Trial On Mar-23-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs First Set Of Special Interrogatories Propounded By Plaintiff To Defendant Sonic Trucking. Llc
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - Plaintiff Creditors' Adjustment Bureau, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to its first set of special interrogatories is granted.

No opposition filed and good cause shown. No later than July 8, 2025 defendant Sonic Trucking LLC must serve verified code-compliant responses without objections and pay sanctions of $672.75 to plaintiff. Sanctions are calculated at the reasonable hourly rate of $300 for two hours.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs First Set Of Demand For Identification, Production, Inspection And Copying Of Documents And Other Tangible Things
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - Plaintiff Creditors' Adjustment Bureau, Inc.'s motion to compel responses to its first set of document requests is granted.

No opposition filed and good cause shown. No later than July 8, 2025 defendant Sonic Trucking LLC must serve verified code-compliant responses without objections, produce all responsive documents, and pay sanctions of $672.75 to plaintiff. Sanctions are calculated at the reasonable hourly rate of $300 for two hours.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
